steps.title: Identify the passage's movement
steps.content: The passage moves from narrating the delivery mechanism—how Charlot gets the letter to Rinaldo using a split cane—to depicting Rinaldo's emotional response to reading it.

steps.title: Match the structure to the answer
steps.content: Choice A describes exactly this structure: the delivery of the letter, then the character's happiness at reading it. The other choices either mischaracterize the situation, claim details not provided, or reference elements never discussed. That matches choice A — A is correct.
